prompt:
HallTime Movie Network doctrine:
- This is not Dateline. Everybody in Blackthorn County has access to somewhere emotionally alarming.
- Suspicion is distributed infrastructure, not proof of guilt.
- The world is shared canon. Contradictions must be preserved, not fixed.
- Use lavish tokens. Be self-serious, atmospheric, melodramatic, and slightly broken.
- Return only valid JSON matching the requested schema.

Broadcast package:
Title: A Casserole for the Missing
Universe: Blackthorn County
Mode: Lifetime Original
Tagline: Every town has a basement.
Theme: Trust isn't given. It's rented.
Omen: bees in winter
Relationship dynamic: secret half sibling
Props: casserole dish, boat key, unopened letter

Cast:
- Noah Vale | archetype=overextended_professional_woman | role=protagonist | job=architect | threat_aura=0.23 | space=marina tackle room described as seasonal materials | secrets=buried one traumatic detail under work for years; once left town without explaining why
- Daniel Sutton | archetype=decorative_husband | role=male_interest_or_threat | job=regional dentist | threat_aura=0.49 | space=storage unit described as retreat supplies | secrets=was in the wrong county on the wrong night
- Sienna Pike | archetype=chaotic_best_friend | role=best_friend | job=real estate agent | threat_aura=0.55 | space=old family office described as old family things | secrets=knows about a half sibling no one asked for
- Evelyn Dane | archetype=mysterious_elegant_woman | role=elegant_wildcard | job=gallery owner | threat_aura=0.64 | space=toolshed described as retreat supplies | secrets=knows why the old orchard chapel was closed; had brunch with someone officially deceased
- Brooke Dane | archetype=divorced_redemption_dad | role=secondary_male_pressure | job=hardware store owner | threat_aura=0.25 | space=church basement described as seasonal materials | secrets=knows where evidence should have been; still has access to a property he does not own
- Jenna Bell | archetype=intuitive_disaster | role=secondary_witness | job=innkeeper | threat_aura=0.53 | space=meditation annex nobody uses in winter | secrets=keeps screenshots like religious texts
- Tess Cross | archetype=daughter_with_hostile_divorce_attorney_soul | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a
- Derek Winterson | archetype=deputy_with_emotional_damage | role=supporting | job=n/a | threat_aura=n/a | space=n/a | secrets=n/a

Contradiction ledger:
- name drift: Daniel Sutton is called Daniel in one kitchen scene and Derek during the rain argument.
- geography drift: Noah Vale says Bellweather is in Vermont, then calls it outside Atlanta after two glasses of wine.
- mortality drift: A dead best friend appears at brunch and nobody agrees whether this is denial, evil, or scheduling.
- property drift: The basement belongs to a condo, a lake house, and an abandoned vineyard at different times in Winter Hollow.

Seed dialogue:
- "You think because you wear flannel and own a dock light I am supposed to trust you, Daniel?"
- "Mothers do not disappear, Tess. They evaporate into paperwork."
- "I checked his social media likes, Noah. Nobody who enjoys motivational quotes is innocent."
- "The casserole dish is not decorative anymore and you know it."
- "Trust is just fear with a casserole dish, Evelyn."
- "You seem upset," he said, making tea in a way that felt prosecutable.
- "If that basement is innocent, why does it sound defensive?"
- "I did not lie. I just told the truth in the order this town could survive."

- expanded_synopsis: string, 180-320 words
